name: EMA Crossover with RSI Filter
extras: Only trade during London/NY overlap. Add ATR-based stop loss.

name: Bollinger Band Squeeze
extras: Include volume confirmation. Exit on band expansion.

name: VWAP Reversal
extras: Only long above VWAP, only short below. Use 15m timeframe.

name: SMC Order Block Entry
extras: Identify order blocks on H4, enter on M15 retest with confluence.

name: Opening Range Breakout
extras: Use first 30 minutes as range. Add gap filter to avoid gap-and-fail.
